rationale: This is a static IP-driven anime splash for Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle — it has zero mechanical overlap with Roof Rails' running/sliding/pole-balancing loop and would be IP-infringing to mimic with Goku directly. While the saturated cyan/magenta/yellow palette has surface similarity to Roof Rails' bright pastel scheme, the dense anime art style, gacha-RPG audience, and "PLAY NOW!" static format target a completely different player (mid-core anime gacha fans vs. broad hypercasual). Do not adapt; the only takeaway is the high-contrast neon palette, which we already use natively.
